here are more of my projects!

I’ll do full write-ups on them eventually…

  • [ 2022-06-03 / 2024-06-05] Belly Up

2D Movement Based Fish Shooter. Made for “Mini Jam 109: Depth(s).” Lead Programmer

  • [ 2024-03-11 / dormant… ] FINUXOS

Long awaited sequel to FinuxOS. NOT PLAYABLE YET. Project Lead

  • [ 2021-06-25 / 2021-07-11 ] Sketch In Progress

2D Roguelike Platformer. Made for “a jam about time.” Lead Programmer

  • [ 2021-04-13 / 2021-04-27 ] Disconnection

First solo development project! 2D Puzzle Platformer Speedrunner. Made for “OST Jam Vol. 2.” Programming, Game Design, 2D Art

  • [ 2020-12-15 / 2020-12-24 ] Quarantined Delivery

My very first (released) game!! Topdown 2D Stealth Speedrunner. Made for “Design Buddies Game Jam.” Programming (Unity), Game Design, Final Video, Background Music

there is always more...
